title: The Favorite Bookshelf Tower
summary: A tall narrow bookshelf tower with applied crown moulding, a header cap, and slatted side legs — dressed-up trim details on a simple 1x12 box.
description:
This tower's box is a straightforward 1x12 case — two sides, four shelves, and a top — but its finished look comes almost entirely from the trim wrapped around that plain box afterward: side legs, a header, front bottom trim, and a crown moulding detail at the very top. Build the plain box first exactly like any simple bookshelf: sides, shelves, and top, joined square before any trim goes on.

**The side legs run the full height of the piece and are what give it its tower proportions** — 1x2 and 1x3 boards applied to the front and sides of the case, with the header trim sized and cut to fit your actual assembled box rather than to a fixed number, since real lumber width varies enough to throw off a fixed measurement on a piece this tall and narrow.

The crown moulding pieces at the top are genuinely the last detail, cut and measured to fit after everything else is square and trimmed — a small cove moulding kept modest so it reads as a finished cap rather than an ornate flourish. The back panel is optional, and going without it is a legitimate choice if the piece will sit against a wall where the back is never seen.

materials.name: 1/4" plywood or MDF, half sheet (optional back)
Primer and paint, or interior wood stain

cutList.material: 1/4" plywood or MDF, half sheet (optional back)
cutList.note: Optional; measure and cut to fit.

steps.title: Build the box
steps.body: Assemble the sides, bottom, shelves, and top into a square box with glue and brad nails.

steps.title: Add the header
steps.body: Measure and cut the header side and top pieces to fit the assembled box, then attach with brad nails and glue.

steps.title: Attach the side legs
steps.body: Attach the 1x2 and 1x3 leg pieces to the front and sides of the case, running the full height of the piece.

steps.title: Add the top and bottom side trim
steps.body: Measure and cut the side trim pieces for the top and bottom to fit, and attach.

steps.title: Add the front bottom trim
steps.body: Measure and cut the front bottom trim piece to fit and attach.

steps.title: Attach the back panel (optional)
steps.body: Measure and cut the optional 1/4" plywood or MDF back to fit and attach with brad nails and glue.
materials: 1/4" plywood or MDF, half sheet (optional back)

steps.title: Add the crown moulding
steps.body: Measure and cut the crown moulding side and front pieces to fit at the very top, and attach.

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Fill any nail holes with wood filler, sand all surfaces, and apply primer and paint, or interior wood stain.
materials: Primer and paint, or interior wood stain

images.alt: Tall narrow bookshelf tower with crown moulding
